title: The Deep Void: Curios
description: An add-on for The Deep Void that adds baubles with curios
body:
The Deep Void: Curios adds curios baubles to The Deep Void with unique abilities that have pros and cons attached to them.
<details>
<summary>This add-on adds 15 new baubles:</summary>

Necrosed Skin Blindfold
- Makes the wearer blind, but doubles all damage dealt

Wilting Flower
- Has a chance to negate incoming damage, but the flower wilts each time

Sigil Of Void
- Increases the effectiveness of other baubles, but increases the damage received

Void Mass
- Grants Void's Blessing when equipped until broken, but attracts the all-consuming void

Pustule
- Sends out spores that apply poison and nausea to attackers, but also poisons the user

Stasis Heart
- When hurt, delays the time it takes before the damage is applied, but slightly increases it

Thorns Crown
- When worn, all entities become passive unless provoked, but deals constant damage

Licker Sticker
- Makes the user stick to ceilings, but makes them slower on the ground

Shard Of Experience
- Grants more experience, but increases exhaustion

Rotten Handcuffs
- Makes the user invulnerable to attacks, but restricts their hands and healing

Onyx Mail Plate
- When attacked, the user will be given speed, but also rot

Hunter Belt
- Negates knockback when attacked, but heightens the aggression of nearby mobs

Voidrium Charm
- Saves the user from lethal damage, but they won't be able to move or attack for some time afterwards

Rotting Heart
- Increases maximum health and armor toughness, but halves damage dealt and decreases movement speed significantly

Disturbing Bark
- Heals and feeds the user through twisting roots, but disallows natural healing and the use of items and roots the user in place

</details>
